ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] Explore supplemental activities described in the text.
[ ] Explore additional books from Extra Helpings or Library.
[ ] Website: [Sky Charts](https://in-the-sky.org/skymap2.php) by In the Sky (mobile apps, like SkyView, are good options, too)
[ ] Website: [Flower Pigment Chromatography Instructions](https://www.sciencebuddies.org/science-fair-projects/project-ideas/PlantBio_p035/plant-biology/red-flower-pigments) by Science Buddies
[ ] Website: [Gallery of European Butterflies](https://projectnoah.org/missions/european-butterflies-and-moths) by Project Noah
[ ] Website: [Gallery of American Butterflies](https://butterfliesofamerica.com/L/Neotropical.htm) by Butterflies of America Foundation
[ ] Website: [Gallery of North American Butterflies and Moths](https://www.butterfliesandmoths.org/gallery) by Butterflies and Moths
[ ] Website: [Gallery of African Butterflies and Moths](https://www.lepsocafrica.org/) by African Butterfly Database
[ ] Website: [Gallery of Southeast Asian Butterflies](https://pbase.com/bfmom/southeast_asia_butterflies) by Butterflies of Asia

resources.title: Butterfly Kit with voucher for larvae
resources.author: Home Science Tools
resources.rationale: Be sure to consider the temperature before redeeming your voucher.

resources.title: The Stars: A New Way to See Them
resources.author: H.A. Rey

resources.title: The Way Things Work: Newly Revised Edition: The Ultimate Guide to How Things Work
resources.author: David Macaulay
resources.rationale: This well-written and humorously illustrated classic guides readers through the fundamental principles of machines and shows how the developments of the past are building blocks of the world of tomorrow.
